desk.rationale: Signal+Risk green; Research dissents but regime clean and stop well-defined.
desk.plan: Enter WMB at 74.95 with a stop at 70.71 (below the 71.27 support pivot) and a first target at 83.43 — that's a 2:1 R:R. Thesis: steady 5-day momentum in a clean risk-on regime with RSI in neutral territory (59.7), so there's real room to run without chasing. Half size because Research is right that there's no fundamental catalyst — if the tape turns or sector rotates, this unwinds fast; that's the thing to watch.

signal.note: Early momentum, RSI mid-range, steady 5d gain. Room to run.

research.note: Pure technicals, no news. Uptrend is noise without fundamental catalyst.

risk.concern: Clean risk-on regime setup. RSI 59.7 neutral, modest 2d/5d gains. Safe entry.

desk.rationale: Signal+Risk aligned; Research dissents; RSI 64 slightly elevated warrants caution.
desk.plan: Enter SW at 45.41, stop at 42.86 (below the 43.39 support), target 50.52 for a 2:1 reward. Momentum is building in a favorable regime with SPY above its 50-day, but RSI at 64 is getting warm and there's no news behind the move. Quarter size only — if momentum stalls around current levels without a catalyst materializing, exit early rather than riding it to the stop.

synthesis.summary: Micron surged ~7% after announcing a strategic partnership with Anthropic covering memory, storage AI architecture, and enterprise Claude adoption — a deal that directly positions MU's hardware as infrastructure for a leading AI lab. The magnitude of the move likely reflects both the headline partnership and broader enthusiasm for AI memory demand, as the news alone (a commercial agreement with no disclosed financials) doesn't fully account for a near-7% single-day gain.
